description: Create a performance scorecard for sales representatives using Power BI Desktop with the source data 'sales_data.csv' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv'. The report must include a calculated column named 'Margin_Per_Unit' (Unit_Price - Unit_Cost) and a 'Performance_Tier' column categorizing Sales_Amount (>= 500 as 'High', >= 200 as 'Medium', and others as 'Low'). The dashboard should feature a Table visual displaying Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, and Performance_Tier with a background color scale conditional formatting applied to Sales_Amount. Additionally, include a Gauge visual representing the Average of Discount against a target value of 0.10. Save the completed report as 'Rep_Scorecard.pbix' to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\'.
